THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT PROVIDE MOVING PAPERS OR REPLY PAPERS. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT TIME TO CONTINUE THE MOTION BECAUSE THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE SET IS 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. (CCP 437C(A)). TRIAL MOTION HEARD ON FEB-28-2014 IN DEPT.318 - DEFENDANT ITT CANNON LLC DBA BIW CONNECTOR SYSTEMS' MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ITS MOTION IS SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED; DEFENDANT ITT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK L. FONG; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998 [415.948.8289].

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GARRETT PROCKNOW'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO DEFENDANT WABASH METAL PRODUCTS, INC. IS DENIED. THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO THE "AMENDED" MOTION PAPERS FILED WITHOUT LEAVE OF COURT SUBSEQUENT TO THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS FILED FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324(B) AND IS DENIED ON THAT BASIS. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION DOES NOT SPECIFICALLY HIGHLIGHT WHICH DISCOVERY HE OBTAINED THAT GAVE RISE TO THE PROPOSED AMENDMENT OR WHY THE MOTION COULD NOT HAVE BEEN MADE EARLIER. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF DELAYED SEVERAL MONTHS IN BRINGING THE MOTION, AND ALLOWING AMENDMENT NOW IN LIGHT OF THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WOULD UNDULY PREJUDICE DEFENDANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR# 12353.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Add Punitive Damages As To Deft Wabash Metal Products, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Eric J. Ratinoff, Esq. of Kershaw Cutter & Ratinoff LLP, Tel. 916.448.9800, for plaintiff and moving party;
Charles E. Coleman, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 916.564.5400 for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GARRETT PROCKNOW's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Add Punitive Damages As To Defendant Wabash Metal Products, Inc. is denied. The Court sustains Defendant's objection to the "amended" motion papers filed without leave of court subsequent to the opposition papers. Plaintiff's motion as filed fails to comply with CRC 3.1324(b) and is denied on that basis. Plaintiff's declaration does not specifically highlight which discovery he obtained that gave rise to the proposed amendment or why the motion could not have been made earlier. Moreover, Plaintiff delayed several months in bringing the motion, and allowing amendment now in light of the current trial date would unduly prejudice defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.

DEFENDANT ITT CANNON LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar. The moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B, which requires courtesy copies to be delivered to the department hearing the motion. The moving party did not provide moving papers or reply papers. There is insufficient time to continue the motion because the original hearing date set is 30 days before trial. (CCP 437c(a)).
